entries.question: How do I track my order?
entries.answer: You can track your order by logging into your account and visiting the 'My Orders' section. Click on your order number to see real-time tracking information.

entries.question: Can I modify my order after placing it?
entries.answer: Orders can be modified within 30 minutes of placement. After that, the order enters processing and cannot be changed. Contact support immediately if you need changes.

entries.question: How do I cancel my order?
entries.answer: To cancel your order, go to 'My Orders', select the order, and click 'Cancel'. Cancellations are only possible before the order ships (usually within 2 hours).

entries.question: What payment methods do you accept?
entries.answer: We accept Visa, Mastercard, American Express, Discover, PayPal, Apple Pay, Google Pay, and Shop Pay.

entries.question: Why was my order cancelled?
entries.answer: Orders may be cancelled due to: payment issues, item unavailability, or fraud detection. Check your email for details or contact support.

entries.question: What are your shipping options?
entries.answer: We offer Standard (5-7 days), Express (2-3 days), and Overnight shipping. Free shipping on orders over $50.

entries.question: Do you ship internationally?
entries.answer: Yes! We ship to Canada, UK, EU, Australia, and 50+ countries. International shipping takes 7-14 business days.

entries.question: How much does shipping cost?
entries.answer: Standard shipping: $4.99 (free over $50). Express: $9.99. Overnight: $19.99. International: starts at $14.99.

entries.question: My package shows delivered but I didn't receive it.
entries.answer: Check with neighbors, look around your property, and wait 24 hours. If still missing, contact us with your order number for investigation.

entries.question: Can I change my shipping address?
entries.answer: Address changes are only possible before shipment. Contact support immediately with your order number and correct address.

entries.question: What is your return policy?
entries.answer: We accept returns within 30 days of delivery. Items must be unused, in original packaging. Refunds processed in 5-7 business days.

entries.question: How do I initiate a return?
entries.answer: Log into your account, go to 'My Orders', select the item, and click 'Return'. Print the prepaid label and drop off at any carrier location.

entries.question: Are return shipping fees free?
entries.answer: Yes! We provide free return shipping on all orders. Simply use the prepaid label provided.

entries.question: Can I exchange instead of return?
entries.answer: Yes! During the return process, select 'Exchange' and choose your preferred size or color. We'll ship the new item when we receive your return.

entries.question: What items cannot be returned?
entries.answer: Final sale items, intimate apparel, opened cosmetics, and personalized items cannot be returned. Check product page for details.

entries.question: How do I find my size?
entries.answer: Check our size guide on each product page. Measure yourself and compare to the chart. Still unsure? Contact support for personalized recommendations.

entries.question: Are your products authentic?
entries.answer: Yes, 100%! We are an authorized retailer for all brands we carry. Every item comes with original packaging and authenticity guarantee.

entries.question: Do you restock sold out items?
entries.answer: Popular items are restocked regularly. Sign up for 'Back in Stock' notifications on the product page to be alerted.

entries.question: What is the warranty on products?
entries.answer: All products include manufacturer warranty. Electronics: 1 year. Clothing: 90 days. Extended warranties available at checkout.

entries.question: How do I check product availability?
entries.answer: Product availability is shown on each product page. If an item is in your cart, it's reserved for 30 minutes.

entries.question: How do I create an account?
entries.answer: Click 'Sign Up' at the top right. Enter your email, create a password, and you're done! You can also checkout as a guest.

entries.question: I forgot my password. How do I reset it?
entries.answer: Click 'Login', then 'Forgot Password'. Enter your email and we'll send a reset link. Check spam folder if not received.

entries.question: How do I update my account information?
entries.answer: Log in and go to 'My Account' > 'Settings'. Update your name, email, addresses, and payment methods.

entries.question: How do I delete my account?
entries.answer: Contact support to request account deletion. Note: this will remove all order history and saved information permanently.

entries.question: Is my personal information secure?
entries.answer: Yes! We use 256-bit SSL encryption and never share your data. Read our Privacy Policy for full details on data protection.
